description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:lts Docker image and two stages: test and build. In the test stage add an audit job that runs `cd src/server` then `npm audit`, is allowed to fail, and runs only for merge requests and the master branch. Also in test add a lint-client job that runs `cd src/client`, `npm install`, and `npm run lint`, and a lint-server job that runs `cd src/server`, `npm install`, and `npm run lint`; both jobs run only for merge requests and master. No caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined.
